Name: FrameID
Description: The id of the iframe element to read from.

Name: ExternalFunction
Description: The name of a JavaScript function defined inside the frame's window; it is called (with no arguments) and should return the data to import.

Name: DataKey
Description: The storage item that will receive the value returned by the frame function.

Name: IsClone
Description: When true, the returned data is cloned before being stored instead of referenced.
